arm-none-eabi-g++ -mcpu=cortex-m3 -mthumb -ffreestanding -Wall -O0 -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -mcpu=cortex-m3 -mthumb -T/home/ignat/cpp_projects/intensiv/Hardware-Applicatios/OOP_blinking_LED/linker.ld -nostartfiles -Wl,--gc-sections CMakeFiles/stm32_baremetal.dir/startup.s.o CMakeFiles/stm32_baremetal.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stm32_baremetal.dir/src/system.cpp.o -o stm32_baremetal  -lc -lm -lnosys
